canonical_definition: A benchmark suite composed of hundreds of deep mutational scan (DMS) studies used to evaluate the zero-shot fitness prediction capabilities of protein language models.
papers: Metalic: Meta-Learning In-Context with Protein Language Models
Protein Language Model Fitness is a Matter of Preference

relationships.evidence: Specifically, we take the wild type proteins in 217 DMS studies from ProteinGym (Notin et al., 2023) and calculating PLLs for each of them. (Section 4.3)
